screen.rationale: Piotroski 5/9 = 55.6% (just clears 55% WATCH cutoff, below 75% PASS) with Magic Formula PASS (EY 6.18%, ROIC 20.07% — both clear single-ticker thresholds); methodology piotroski_mixed_v1 because long_term_debt is null so F5 fell back to total_debt trend (mcp_constrained_q7); strengths are positive ROA + improving trend, OCF, current-ratio improvement, and asset-turnover expansion; offset by accruals failure (NI > OCF — earnings outran cash), total-debt rising YoY, modest share-count increase, and slight gross-margin compression from already-high 89%.

signal.qualitative_note: Clean TTM EPS €32.33 after stripping €1.29/share SBC (€40.6M TTM ÷ 31.5M shares — very low SBC intensity at ~1.5% of revenue, typical of EU fintech vs US tech). PEG 2.42 = clean fwd P/E 19.2 ÷ derived 5y EPS growth 7.94% (eps_growth_5y null in yfinance so fallback derivation used: NTM/clean-TTM compounded to 5y); PEG sensitive to the conservative compounding — 1-year NTM jump is +46% but compounded 5y derives 7.94%. AI layer N/A — payments platform, AI not material to thesis.
